---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new use-case variant, fluency level, or improvement to the skill
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to add or improve?**
e.g. A new use-case file for MBA applications, improved guidance for a specific discipline.

**Why is this useful?**
Who benefits and in what situation?

**Sources (if proposing content changes)**
Cite peer-reviewed research or credible practitioner guidance where relevant.

**Are you willing to submit a PR?**
Yes / No / Maybe
